Veterans Benefits: Iowa exempts military retirement pay and survivor benefits from state income tax, offers military and disabled-veteran property tax relief, and provides state veterans services including employment, education, and county veterans-affairs assistance.
LGBTQSource: MAP Iowa state policy score; no Decorah MEI score located; MAP lists Decorah among local gender-identity ordinance jurisdictions
Description: Driftless Area college town and Winneshiek County seat anchored by Luther College, the Vesterheim Norwegian-American Museum, a local VA clinic, and Upper Iowa River outdoor recreation. Decorah has low cost of living for a college-town setting, strong hiking, biking, fishing, arts, and heritage amenities, but cold snowy winters and county-level presidential returns that have shifted more Republican since 2016.
